_comment: Reference configuration for phase5 classification thresholds.
_usage: Copy this file to env_field_pipeline_output/env5_thresholds.json before running phase5, OR rely on phase5.py DEFAULT_THRESHOLDS (which mirrors these values).

_version_history.v1_cross10: initial setting; main list 405; admits descriptive low-PMID fields
_version_history.v2_cross30: current; main list 210; retains numeric fields PMID 30-49 (mixed_layer_depth, ice_thickness, secchi_disk_depth, sediment_mean_grain_size, porewater_salinity, soil_organic_carbon, ...) while dropping low-coverage noise
